name: Babka (Polish Easter Bread)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Unsalted Butter, cut into 1-inch pieces
1 can (14 oz) Dried Raisins, without seeds
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine flour and sugar.
3. Dissolve yeast in milk; let stand for 5 minutes until foamy.
4. Add butter to the yeast mixture and stir until crumbly.
5. Beat eggs into the dough until smooth.
6. Stir in raisins and mix until combined.
7. Transfer batter to a greased baking pan and shape into a loaf.
8. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown.
9. Remove from oven and let cool on a wire rack before slicing.
